note: D1 golden set v1 (Phase 1, 2D subset). Vendor-free constructed DXF. FIELD / ACAD_TABLE / XREF / 天正 categories are plugin-produced or hand-unauthorable and are deferred (see deferred[]); the lines-text BOM stands in for the parts-list category, which is the dominant real-world 明细栏 form. KNOWN GAP vs §5: D2 v0 has NO text/geometry split (needs a renderer-supplied text mask, a B-line follow-up), so the gate metric `ink_iou` is text+geometry combined. To keep the gate honest during the font-substitution period, text-DOMINANT drawings are gate=false (a font substitution must not false-fail until the split exists); geometry-dominant drawings stay gate=true.

drawings.name: multi_frame
drawings.notes: 一图多框: two A4 frames side by side in model space.

drawings.name: lines_text_bom
drawings.notes: 明细栏 as lines+text (not an ACAD_TABLE object) — the common form. gate=false: text-dominant, can't gate on the combined metric until the text/geometry split exists (else font substitution false-fails).

drawings.name: cjk_text
drawings.notes: Font resolution. gate=false until D2 has a text/geometry split — a Noto-vs-华文 substitution changes glyph shapes and would false-fail the combined gate; tracked as a trend metric instead.

drawings.name: garbage_extents
drawings.notes: Stray entity at 1e6 blows $EXTMAX; B5 --window frames the sheet rect.

drawings.name: wide_coords
drawings.notes: Frame far off origin (5e6); extents fit must still frame it.

drawings.name: stale_small_header
drawings.notes: common-window v2: $EXTMIN/$EXTMAX (header) is stale-small (0,0)-(50,50) but the geometry runs to (200,100). render_cli content_bbox must report the REAL extent (max_x>=150, max_y>=90) — proving why v1's header-window clips and v2's content_bbox-window does not. gate=false: this is a content_bbox-assertion fixture, not an ink-IoU baseline.

deferred.reason: needs an ACAD_FIELD dict — plugin-produced; render-side renders the cached text fine, metadata assertion needs the plugin.
TABLE rendering is Phase 2; golden would be metadata/BOM-only, not a fidelity score.
needs an external ref + bind; plugin produces the twin. Golden expectation = incomplete-preview declaration (validator-side, covered by test_validator).
X2 pending — needs a real 天正 sample from the dedup corpus.
